attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 'SBP_ACCRUALS' AS TRANSACTION_TYPE ,
 WF_AT.RPO_FLG                       ,
 CAST((WI_ACRL.ACCRUAL_AMOUNT * (WI_SC.DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100.000000) * COALESCE(CAST(WF_AT.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(26,16)),CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(26,16)))) AS DECIMAL(26,7))AS UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT ,
 WF_AT.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH          ,
 WF_AT.FISCAL_MTH                    ,
  WF_AT.SRC_ENTITY                    ,
 WI_SC.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
 WF_AT.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
  WF_AT.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
 WF_AT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
  WF_AT.WEB_ORDER_ID                  ,
  WF_AT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  WF_AT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  WF_AT.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY         ,
  WF_AT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,
  WF_AT.SERVICE_FLG                   ,
  WF_AT.CORP_FLG                      ,
  WF_AT.CONTRACT_START_DTM            ,
  WF_AT.CONTRACT_END_DTM              ,
  WF_AT.CONTRACT_TERM                 ,
  WF_AT.CONTRACT_NUM                  ,
  WF_AT.ERP_DEAL_ID                   ,
  WF_AT.AUTO_RELEASE_DT               ,
  WF_AT.FHI_BNI_FLG                   ,
  WF_AT.CISCO_BOOKED_DT               ,
 WF_AT.ORACLE_BOOK_DTM               ,
  WF_AT.PROCESS_DT                    ,
  WF_AT.SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT             ,
  WF_AT.HOLD_FLG                      ,
  WF_AT.EARLY_SHIP_FLG                ,
  WF_AT.SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG      ,
  WF_AT.CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT        ,
  WF_AT.EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
  WF_AT.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
  WF_AT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
  WF_AT.EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
 WF_AT.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY        ,
  WF_AT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
  WF_AT.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD         ,
 0 AS DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT      ,
  WF_AT.DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        ,
  WF_AT.PL_CONVERSION_RATE            ,
  WF_AT.DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM  ,
  WF_AT.DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT ,
  WF_AT.DD_FB_SS_CD                   ,
  WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY     ,
  WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID           ,
  WF_AT.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM           ,
  WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD        ,
  WF_AT.INITIAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
  WF_AT.RENEWAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
  WF_AT.PREPAID_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
  WF_AT.RENEWAL_CNT                   ,
  WF_AT.BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT     ,
  WF_AT.OFFER_TYPE_CD                 ,
  WF_AT.BILLING_MODEL_NAME            ,
  WF_AT.SUBSCR_LINE_STATUS_CD         ,
  WF_AT.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD           ,
  WF_AT.SRC_CANCEL_DTM                ,
  WF_AT.CHARGE_TYPE_CD                ,
  WF_AT.ATO_NAME                      ,
  WF_AT.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT,
  WF_AT.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT  ,
  WF_AT.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT   ,
  WF_AT.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT     ,
  WF_AT.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          ,
  WF_AT.DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT ,
  WF_AT.DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT       ,
  WF_AT.DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT            ,
  WF_AT.DV_WATERFALL_START_DT         ,
  WF_AT.DV_WATERFALL_END_DT           ,
  WF_AT.DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT    ,
 0 AS DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT   ,
 CASE WHEN SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD IN ('Active','Renewed','Not Active','UNKNOWN') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DV_ACTIVE_FLG,
 0 AS DV_BILLING_CYCLE_ID           ,
 '1900-01-01' AS DV_PREDICTED_MONTH_BILL_DT    ,
 0 AS DV_REM_TERM_MONTHS_CNT        ,
  WF_AT.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG          ,
 CAST('' AS VARCHAR(50))AS DV_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD ,
 NULL AS DV_MILESTONE_START_DT,
 NULL AS DV_MILESTONE_END_DT,
 0 AS DV_ORDER_QUANTITY ,
 0 AS DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
  WF_AT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT,
  WI_SC.DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT ,
   WF_AT.DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG 
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_SBP_WF WF_AT
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ACRL_SUM_DATA WI_ACRL
 ON WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID = WI_ACRL.REF_CODE AND WF_AT.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM = WI_ACRL.SUBSCRIPTION_CODE
 AND WF_AT.PRODUCT_KEY = WI_ACRL.DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY AND WF_AT.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY = WI_ACRL.PRODUCT_KEY
INNER JOIN (SELECT SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID, BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM, PRODUCT_KEY ,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,SUM(DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT) AS DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SBP_GROSS_UNBILLED_REVENUE 
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5) WI_SC
 ON WI_SC.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID = WI_ACRL.REF_CODE AND WI_SC.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM = WI_ACRL.SUBSCRIPTION_CODE
 AND WI_SC.PRODUCT_KEY = WI_ACRL.DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY AND WI_SC.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY = WI_ACRL.PRODUCT_KEY
  WHERE TRANSACTION_TYPE='SBP'
  AND NOT (WI_ACRL.TIME_BOUND_CRDT_APLD_FLG='Y' AND WF_AT.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME IN ('Daily Rates','Daily Rates - NRST'))
 QUALIFY  Row_Number() Over (PARTITION BY WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID ,WF_AT.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM,WF_AT.PRODUCT_KEY,WF_AT.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,WI_SC.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ORDER BY FISCAL_MTH ASC)=1

SELECT 
NACRL.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY,
NACRL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT,             
CAST(ELACRL.REF_CODE AS VARCHAR(50)) REF_CODE,
ELACRL.SUBSCRIPTION_CODE ,
NACRL.PRODUCT_KEY ,
NACRL.DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY ,
NACRL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
NACRL.SK_LINE_REF_NUM ,
NACRL.ATTRIBUTION_CD ,
NACRL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          ,
NACRL.TSV_TRXL_AMT ,
NACRL.SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM      ,
NACRL.ACCT_CLASS_CD ,
NACRL.OFFR_ATTR_PCT ,                 
NACRL.RU_CREDIT_TRXL_AMT ,
NACRL.RU_DEBIT_TRXL_AMT ,
NACRL.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD ,
NACRL.RU_CDT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY,
NACRL.RU_DBT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY,
NACRL.TIME_BOUND_CRDT_APLD_FLG,
ELACRL.flexup_flag
FROM 
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX NACRL
INNER JOIN ( SELECT REF_CODE, SUBSCRIPTION_CODE, UNIQUE_ID,flexup_flag FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXCFIR_REV_ACRL
GROUP BY 1,2,3 ,4) ELACRL
ON NACRL.SK_LINE_REF_NUM = ELACRL.UNIQUE_ID
WHERE NACRL.ACCT_CLASS_CD IN ('CONTRACT_ASSETS','LT_CONTRACT_ASSETS')
AND ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD NOT IN ('BSFT-OPL')

SELECT
WI_ACRL.REF_CODE,
WI_ACRL.SUBSCRIPTION_CODE ,
WI_ACRL.PRODUCT_KEY ,
WI_ACRL.DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY , 
CAST(SUM((RU_DEBIT_TRXL_AMT-RU_CREDIT_TRXL_AMT)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS ACCRUAL_AMOUNT,
TIME_BOUND_CRDT_APLD_FLG,
flexup_flag
FROM $$STGDB.WI_ACRL_TRXNL_DATA WI_ACRL
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,6,7

SELECT
'ERP_ACCRUALS' AS TRANSACTION_TYPE,
WF.RPO_FLG,
WF.UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT,
WF.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH,
WF.FISCAL_MTH,
WF.SRC_ENTITY,
WF.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
WF.PRODUCT_KEY,
WF.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
WF.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
WF.WEB_ORDER_ID,
WF.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
WF.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
WF.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY  AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY       ,
COALESCE(WF.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
WF.SERVICE_FLG,
WF.CORP_FLG, 
WF.CONTRACT_START_DTM,
WF.CONTRACT_END_DTM,
WF.CONTRACT_TERM,
WF.CONTRACT_NUM,
COALESCE(WF.ERP_DEAL_ID,'-9999') AS BK_DEAL_ID,
WF.AUTO_RELEASE_DT,
WF.FHI_BNI_FLG, 
WF.CISCO_BOOKED_DT ,              
WF.ORACLE_BOOK_DTM ,
WF.PROCESS_DT, 
WF.SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT,
WF.HOLD_FLG,
WF.EARLY_SHIP_FLG,      
WF.SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG,
WF.CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
WF.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY ,
WF.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
WF.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,   
WF.DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT,
WF.DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD AS TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
WF.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS CONVERSION_RATE,
WF. DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM, 
WF.DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT AS PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT,
WF. DD_FB_SS_CD AS SS_CD,
0 as SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY,
0 as SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,
'UNKNOWN' as BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM,
'UNKNOWN' as SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD,
-999 as INITIAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
-999 as RENEWAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
-999 as PREPAID_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
-999 as RENEWAL_CNT                   ,
-999 as BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT     ,
'UNKNOWN' as OFFER_TYPE_CD                 ,
'UNKNOWN' as BILLING_MODEL_NAME            ,
'UNKNOWN' as SUBSCR_LINE_STATUS_CD         ,
'UNKNOWN' as SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD           ,
'1900-01-01 00:00:00' as SRC_CANCEL_DTM	   ,
'UNKNOWN' as CHARGE_TYPE_CD                ,
'UNKNOWN' as ATO_NAME                      ,
WF.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT,
WF.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT  ,
WF.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT   ,
WF.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT     ,
WF.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          ,
WF.DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT ,
WF.DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT       ,
WF.DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT            ,
WF.DV_WATERFALL_START_DT         ,
WF.DV_WATERFALL_END_DT           ,
WF.DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT,    
-- ,UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT AS WF_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT
0 AS DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT,
'N' AS  DV_ACTIVE_FLG,
WF.DV_BILLING_CYCLE_ID,
'1900-01-01' AS DV_PREDICTED_MONTH_BILL_DT,
0 AS DV_REM_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
WF.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG,   
WF.DV_MILESTONE_START_DT,
WF.DV_MILESTONE_END_DT,
WF.DV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT,
WF.DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
WF.DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG         
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_ERP_WF WF
    LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ACRL_TRXNL_DATA WACRL
     ON WF.SALEs_ORDER_Line_KEY = WACRL.SALEs_ORDER_Line_KEY
    LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX NART
     ON NART .ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY = WACRL.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY           
WHERE NART.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD='Accruals_OM'
